summary: Iter-8: Verified SM auto-provisioning, first-upload station lock, named editor/viewer accounts, viewer RBAC (read-allow + write-block), and SM UI first-time flow. 44/44 backend tests pass. E2E SM first-upload UI flow works (station locks + Locked badge). Found 2 frontend bugs (1 HIGH routing, 1 latent code bug in SMDashboard) that must be fixed.

ui_bugs.issue: Viewer role (e.g. rajesh.gupta, srdcm) is redirected to /upload after login instead of /admin. Line 32: `res.data.user.role === 'admin' ? '/admin' : '/upload'` — this treats viewers as SM. Requirement: viewer must land on /admin.

Line 66 calls `setSession(...)` but `setSession` is NOT imported from `@/lib/api` (line 3 only imports api, getUser, fileUrl). This is a latent ReferenceError. Currently masked because it lives inside an inner try/catch that swallows the error and the subsequent `window.location.reload()` refreshes the session from /auth/me on mount. Fix: add `setSession` to the import statement. Flow still works end-to-end but the intended in-place session refresh never executes.

action_items: Fix Login.jsx line 32: change `res.data.user.role === 'admin' ? '/admin' : '/upload'` → `(res.data.user.role === 'admin' || res.data.user.role === 'viewer') ? '/admin' : '/upload'` so viewers land on /admin.

Fix SMDashboard.jsx line 3: import setSession — change `import api, { getUser, fileUrl } from "@/lib/api";` to `import api, { getUser, fileUrl, setSession } from "@/lib/api";` so the in-place session refresh on first upload actually works before the reload.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py login: `is_sm_pattern` regex is `^sm\d{1,5}$` — good. But note that the SM auto-provision check occurs BEFORE the admin-password guard, and the seed() removes 'sm_no_station' users older than 2026-02-04. Any auto-provisioned sm without a station survives across restarts. If admin wants to clean up test artifacts (sm100..sm999 without station), there's no admin endpoint to do so — consider a cleanup route.

server.py _save_inspection: SM first-upload station value is trusted verbatim (only .strip()). No sanitization or max length. A malicious SM could set station_name='' or a very long string. Recommend: enforce `1 <= len(station_name) <= 32` and strip odd characters.

SMDashboard.jsx line 66 setSession not imported (see bug). Even after fixing, note that `setSession` sets localStorage; after 800ms `window.location.reload()` re-fetches /auth/me anyway — the in-place setSession call is redundant. Consider dropping it.

Login.jsx uses `location.state?.from?.pathname` — a viewer whose Protected redirect landed on /login with state.from=/admin will get /admin, but a direct /login visit gets /upload. This is confusing behaviour. The routing bug will manifest for direct-login users only.

success_rate.frontend: 80% — first-upload flow works E2E; viewer routing bug + missing import

test_credentials: admin/Admin@123, sm001/Station@123, rajesh.gupta/Admin@123 (viewer), srdcm/Admin@123 (viewer), dhananjay.kumar.rai/Admin@123 (editor). Auto-provisioned in tests: sm100-sm999 range (random per test run).
seed_data_creation: Backend tests auto-provisioned multiple sm100-sm999 accounts and one TEST_STN_* inspection per test. UI test created sm132 with station TEST_UI_STN and 1 inspection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully verified. When retesting viewer routing after fix, log in fresh (clear localStorage) at /login as rajesh.gupta / Admin@123 — you MUST land on /admin, not /upload. When retesting SM first-upload flow, note that the 'Made with Emergent' widget in the preview environment overlaps the Submit button in the default 1280x900 viewport — use a taller viewport (1280x1600) OR fire the click via page.evaluate to bypass the overlay.
rca_of_the_issue: Login.jsx redirect uses a strict `=== 'admin'` check; new 'viewer' role introduced in iter-8 was not added to the branch. SMDashboard.jsx setSession import was forgotten when the first-upload session-refresh block was added. Both are simple line-level fixes.
